message:
feat(fcp-core): add required_capability parameter to CapabilityVerifier

Enhance verify() to require explicit capability matching:
- Add required_capability parameter to verify signature
- Check that grants match the required capability ID
- Verify capability_id in claims matches requirement
- Fail early if capability doesn't match, not just operation

This prevents tokens with different capabilities from being
accepted even if they happen to grant the same operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
